canaries.decision: Use existing context-budget and pointer-map fixtures as the offline baseline. Do not install Headroom or enable proxy/MCP/shared-memory behavior until source and dependency review justify a library-only comparison.
blockers: No reviewed local source copy or dependency audit for Headroom yet.
Headroom-like proxy, MCP, shared-memory, provider, and automatic injection surfaces stay disabled.

canaries.decision: Treat as a read-only repo-intelligence canary candidate only. Do not install, index sessions, build embeddings, enable hooks, or write repo changes from Pallium until a local fixture and source review exist.
blockers: Identity drift was repaired, but no local read-only repo-risk fixture has been created from the Pallium source.
Session indexing, embeddings, hooks, and write actions are out of scope for this run.

canaries.decision: Use the existing fake OCR/local media fixture as the provider-free OCR canary. Hosted OCR, model downloads, PaddleOCR, and manga-ocr remain deferred until source review and explicit non-provider install decision.
